← All tools

🗺️ Spatial Data Scraper

Point it at a URL — or paste page text / drop an .html file — and it finds the locations mentioned: addresses, cities, countries, landmarks, rivers, parks. Optionally geocode them and preview them on a map, then export JSON, CSV or GeoJSON. Everything runs in your browser.

Source

URL fetching tries a direct request first, then free CORS proxies (AllOrigins, corsproxy.io) — so the URL you scrape passes through those services. Heavily script-rendered sites may come back thin; use paste instead.

or paste text / HTML — or drop a saved .html file below

Locations

LocationType×LatLngContext
Map preview — geocoded locations
Best-effort NER — review results before publishing · respect sites’ terms · a max tool
